abbreviations.definition: invisible decrease (like sc2tog, but only in the front loops)

materials: 1 (1, 1, 2, 2) skeins of yarn from the Knitted Knocker approved yarn list
Size G (4.5mm) crochet hook (or size needed to get gauge)
3 locking stitch markers (1 in a different color for start of round)

rounds.rawInstruction: Create a magic ring with 6 sc in the ring. Close the ring.
rounds.summary: Create a magic ring and work six single crochets into it, then close the ring.
rounds.title: Rnd 1

rounds.summary: Work 2 sc, then 2 increases; repeat 3 times.
rounds.title: Rnd 3

rounds.summary: Work 4 sc, then 2 increases; repeat 3 times.
rounds.title: Rnd 4

rounds.summary: Work 7 sc, then 1 increase; repeat 3 times.
rounds.title: Rnd 5

rounds.rawInstruction: (Work to 1 sc before marker and inc x 2) x 3 (33 sc)
rounds.summary: Work to one stitch before marker, then do 2 increases; repeat 3 times.
rounds.title: Rnd 6

rounds.rawInstruction: (Work to marker and inc in marked stitch) x 3 (36 sc)
rounds.summary: Work to marker and increase in the marked stitch; repeat 3 times.
rounds.title: Rnd 7

rounds.rawInstruction: Using the tapestry needle, sew in the magic ring's 6" tail.
rounds.summary: Weave in the magic ring tail with a tapestry needle.
rounds.title: Sew in magic ring tail

rounds.rawInstruction: Repeat Rnds 6 & 7 until the correct cup size measurement is reached. A cup: 3 repeats to 13 rounds (~63 sc). B cup: 4 repeats to 15 rounds (~72 sc). C cup: 5 repeats to 17 rounds (~81 sc). D cup: 6 repeats to 19 rounds (~90 sc). DD cup: 7 repeats to 21 rounds (~99 sc).
rounds.summary: Cycle through Rounds 6 and 7 until the front measures the correct size for your chosen cup.
rounds.title: Repeat Rnds 6 & 7

rounds.rawInstruction: Work 2 rnds even through the back loop only.
rounds.summary: Work two rounds of single crochet in the back loop only, without increasing or decreasing.
rounds.title: Turning Rounds

rounds.rawInstruction: (inv dec (PM), inv dec, then sc until 1 sc before the next marker) x 3
rounds.summary: Work invisible decrease, place marker, another invisible decrease, then sc to one stitch before next marker; repeat 3 times.
rounds.title: Rnd 1

rounds.rawInstruction: Repeat Rnd 1 until you have 15 sc left.
rounds.summary: Repeat the decrease round until only 15 stitches remain.
rounds.title: Repeat Rnd 1

rounds.summary: Cut the yarn, leaving a 10-inch tail for finishing.
rounds.title: Cut yarn

rounds.rawInstruction: Thread tapestry needle and weave through the front loop only for the remaining 15 sc.
rounds.summary: Thread the tapestry needle and weave through the front loop only of the remaining 15 stitches.
rounds.title: Weave through front loops

rounds.rawInstruction: Slightly overstuff with Poly-fil (or other fiber fill). Do not close hole as it is difficult to reopen. Tuck tail into Knocker so that filling can be adjusted as needed.
rounds.summary: Slightly overstuff the Knocker with fiber fill, leaving the hole open for adjustment.
rounds.title: Stuff Knocker
